name: Dumbbell Stiff-Leg Deadlift
lead: Exercise for legs, glutes and lower back muscles

instructions.starting position: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and toes facing forward. Bend knees slightly and push your chest out. Hold a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your upper thighs.
instructions.execution: Keeping your legs stiff, bow forward and lower the weights towards the ground. Pause when your hamstrings are tight, and then return to the starting position. Keep your back straight and shoulders back throughout.
